info.title: Global options:
info.description:
--backend-url <string>                             Set the Ikon backend URL
--backend-token <string>                           Set the Ikon backend token
--space-id <string>                                Space ID to use for space-scoped backend token
--reset                                            Reset the Ikon tool by clearing all user data
--disable-auto-login                               Disable auto login to the Ikon backend
--disable-auto-update                              Disable automatic update checks (setting CI=true env var will also disable auto updates)
--log-trace                                        Enable trace logging
--log-debug                                        Enable debug logging
--log-usage                                        Enable usage logging
--all-keys                                         Request all API keys from the backend (admin only)
Authentication
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
login [target]                                     Login to the Ikon backend
logout                                             Logout from the Ikon backend
Configuration
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
config                                             Select the active organisation and space
General
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
examples [action]                                  Open or download Ikon example projects
status                                             Show the current login status and backend environment
update                                             Update the Ikon tool to the latest version
version                                            Print the current version of the Ikon tool
Commands (use 'ikon <command>' for details)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
install ...                                        Installation commands (2 commands)
tool ...                                           Tool management commands (3 commands)
